title: epic.automerge.start
description: Emitted at the start of the automerge phase wrapper (Phase 8.5, via lifecycle-emit.js). AutomergePredicate subscribes to this event (Story #3901) and evaluates the structured-signal verdict; it carries no checkOutcomes because Phase 8 already polled CI to green. Distinct from epic.merge.ready (predicate outcome) and epic.merge.armed (arm outcome).
